description: The CT Cranium DICOM scan is already loaded. A video production team needs a 'clean' 3D render of the skull for a documentary. Generate a 3D surface of the skull and set the 3D background color to pure Green (RGB 0, 255, 0) for chroma keying. Ensure all 3D UI overlays, including the box and orientation indicators, are hidden so only the skull is visible against the green background. Save a screenshot of the 3D view to /home/ga/Documents/chroma_skull.png.
